note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present=a runnable step drives real code (must name a test); pending=specified behavior not yet built; retrospective_gap=shipped without a driving test (must be zero, INV-22). All PENDING: spec/024 is the design gate; scenarios bind as tasks T-024-1..6 land. INC-1 (complete the bao: migration) is deploy-config only and verified operationally, not by a unit test.

scenarios.name: Enforce policy refuses to boot on a plaintext business secret
Warn policy logs each plaintext reference and continues
The permanent exemption set alone may remain plaintext under enforce
Every process secret reference is enumerated for the policy
A business secret migrates from env to a backend with an unchanged resolved value
A new backend registers read-only at the scheme registry and fails closed
The Vaultwarden resolver decrypts a vault item field in native Go
The Passbolt resolver retrieves a resource field via an OpenPGP robot identity
The OpenBao token bootstraps without a durable on-disk secret
The homelab backends are labeled second-tier and are not the default
A hardcoded env default is a violation under enforce
